channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Eva Mendes Shares Sexy Bedroom Photos for Her ‘Valentine,’ Husband Ryan Gosling (with a Subtle Nod to His New Movie)
item.description: The actress wore a T-shirt promoting Gosling's new film, 'Project Hail Mary,' in the sultry snapshots

item.title: High School Podcasters Say 'It Was Really Weird' Being Spoofed by “Saturday Night Live ”(Exclusive)
item.description: In October 2025, 'Saturday Night Live' seemingly spoofed the 'MD Foodie Boyz' podcast with a fictional podcast called 'Snack Homiez'

item.title: “Selling Sunset”’s Jason Oppenheim and Jessica Vargas Have Split but Remain ‘Best Friends’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The Oppenheim Group owner and realtor associate split less than a year after confirming their relationship in April 2025

item.title: Mariska Hargitay Shares Rare Valentine’s Day Photo with Husband Peter Hermann at 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: The couple met on the set of ‘Law & Order: SVU’ in 2002 and wed two years later

item.title: Simone Biles' Husband Jonathan Owens Says He Was Nearly Robbed in Milan as They Attend the Winter Olympics
item.description: Owens said he was carrying a shopping bag when someone tried to grab it and run

item.title: David Harbour Out With Mystery Woman As He Skips Maya Hawke's Wedding
item.description: David Harbour may have found a new flame to keep him warm this winter -- cause we got photos of the "Stranger Things" star out with a mystery woman in...

item.title: Investigators Deploy High-Tech Signal Sniffer in Search for Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Authorities are using advanced Bluetooth detection technology as part of the search for Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing for two weeks. A Pima Coun...

item.title: 'Selling Sunset's Jason Oppenheim and Girlfriend Jessica Vargas Breakup
item.description: Looks like we won't be getting a "Selling Sunset" baby any time soon ... Jason Oppenheim and girlfriend Jessica Vargas have called it quits ... TMZ ha...

item.title: Manchester Orchestra Drummer, Timothy Very, Dead at 42
item.description: Manchester Orchestra is reeling after the sudden death of their longtime drummer Timothy Very. The Atlanta-based indie rock band broke the heartbreaki...

item.title: Former UFC Champ Cain Velasquez Released From Prison on Parole
item.description: Cain Velasquez -- a former UFC heavyweight champion -- has been reunited with his family after spending 11 months locked up for allegedly attempting t...
